phase_overview.name: Source Inventory and Issue Harvest
phase_overview.purpose: Extract and normalize all issues from source documents into machine-readable inventory

phase_overview.name: Contract-Gap Matrix Authoring
phase_overview.purpose: Convert normalized issues into authoritative contract-gap matrix with all required fields

phase_overview.name: ProgramSpec Mapping
phase_overview.purpose: Map each matrix row to required ProgramSpec fields and runner capabilities

phase_overview.name: Remediation Delivery Plan Synthesis
phase_overview.purpose: Organize remediation by dependency order and generate delivery plan

phase_overview.name: Gate and Test Generation
phase_overview.purpose: Generate deterministic validation gates and verification tests for all issues

phase_overview.name: Final Plan Assembly
phase_overview.purpose: Assemble final rewritten plan and validate template conformance

execution_strategy.rationale: Phases must execute sequentially because each phase depends on outputs from previous phase

time_estimate.formula: All phases sequential due to data dependencies
